temporal_description: A medium shot captures a group of five men standing in a dimly lit, green-hued room. The audio is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful ambient score. The music is slow and atmospheric, creating a tense and foreboding mood. In the foreground, an older man with short, graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket, looks forward with a serious expression. To his left, a man in a black long-sleeved shirt stares intently. Behind them, three other men stand in a line, their faces partially obscured by the low light and the shadows of the room. The background consists of a wall with a large, barred window, suggesting a confined or institutional space. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera remains still, holding the group in a tense tableau. It has a deep, resonant quality, like a low-frequency drone mixed with subtle, high-pitched, and dissonant notes that build a sense of unease and anticipation. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects, allowing the unsettling music to dominate the soundscape and heighten the feeling of dread. The camera cuts to a medium close-up of a young man with dark hair, wearing a black shirt. He stands in front of the same barred window, his face illuminated by the same greenish light. He looks slightly off-camera with a concerned and alert expression. The shoulder of another person is visible in the foreground on the left. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left corner. The shot is steady, focusing on the young man's reaction.
